title: 10xV3.1 HT CellPlex Genomics Sample Processing Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"531bk","text":"This protocol is used for rapid generation of 3’ transcriptomic-NGS-ready- single-cell-libraries from pools of multiplexed cells by utilizing Feature Barcode technology and doubling the capacity of the original 10xV3.1 HT protocol, allowing for a capture of ~40,000 multiplexed samples instead of ~20,000 cells from a single sample per port.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Allen Institute
